workflow_rules.task_creation: All tasks must be assigned to a team and primary agent
workflow_rules.delegation: Team leads delegate to sub-agents based on skills
workflow_rules.escalation: Blockers escalate from agent -> team lead -> project lead
workflow_rules.completion: Tasks require success_criteria validation before closure
